options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_songs
options.description: The number of songs that will be automatically unlocked at the start of a run.

options.name: additional_songs
options.description:
The total number of songs that will be placed in the randomization pool.
- This does not count any starting songs or the goal song.
Not all gamemodes have enough songs for the maximum amount on their own.

options.name: additional_item_percentage
options.description:
The percentage of songs that will have 2 items instead of 1 when completing them.
Starting Songs will always have 2 items.
Locations will be filled with duplicate songs if there are not enough items.

options.name: disable_difficulty_reduction
options.description: Prevents plays using difficulty reduction mods from sending checks.

options.name: minimum_grade
options.description:
If Enabled, only send checks for plays with a grade above this value.
If using "CL" mod on Laser, will use Stable's Grading calculation.

options.name: difficulty_sync
options.description:
Changes which difficulties of each beatmapset are able to send checks
Off - Any difficulty of each Beatmapset will send a check.
Strict_Any - Only difficulties that fall in your difficulty ranges will send checks
Strict_Random - A randomly chosen difficulty within your range has to be played. To be used with /check_diff.

options.name: disallow_converts
options.description: Prevents Converts from sending checks. Reccomended if using strict difficulty Sync.

options.name: maximum_length
options.description: Maximum Length a Song can be, in seconds.

options.name: minimum_length
options.description: Minimum Length a Song can be, in seconds.

options.name: minimum_age
options.description: The newest year to pick beatmapsets from.

options.name: maximum_age
options.description: The oldest year to pick beatmapsets from.

options.name: exclude_standard
options.description: Ignores Standard beatmaps when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_standard
options.description:
Atleast 1 beatmap of each included Beatmapset will have a difficulty between the Maximum and Minimum for an included Mode.
Star Ratings are multipled by 100, ie: a Star Rating of 1.23 will be 123.
Has No Effect if the given mode is Excluded.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_standard
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for Standard beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: exclude_catch
options.description: Ignores Catch The Beat beatmaps when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_catch
options.description: Minimum Difficulty for Catch the Beat beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_catch
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for Catch the Beat beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: exclude_taiko
options.description: Ignores Taiko beatmaps when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_taiko
options.description: Minimum Difficulty for Taiko beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_taiko
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for Taiko beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: exclude_4k
options.description: Ignores 4-Key Mania beatmaps when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_4k
options.description: Minimum Difficulty for 4-Key Mania beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_4k
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for 4-Key Mania beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: exclude_7k
options.description: Ignores 7-Key Mania beatmaps when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_7k
options.description: Minimum Difficulty for 7-Key Mania beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_7k
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for 7-Key Mania beatmaps. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: exclude_other_keys
options.description: Ignores Mania beatmaps of Key Counts other than 4 and 7 when Generating.

options.name: minimum_difficulty_other
options.display_name: Miscellaneous Key Counts Minimum Star Rating
options.description: Minimum Difficulty for beatmaps of Key Counts other than 4 and 7. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: maximum_difficulty_other
options.display_name: Miscellaneous Key Counts Maximum Star Rating
options.description: Maximum Difficulty for beatmaps of Key Counts other than 4 and 7. Star Ratings are multipled by 100.

options.name: performance_points_count_percentage
options.description:
Collecting enough 'Performace Points' will unlock the goal song needed for completion.
This option controls how many are in the item pool, based on the total number of songs.
The 'Performance Points' in this multiworld are unrelated to your accounts PP Score.

options.name: performance_points_win_count_percentage
options.description: The percentage of Performance Points in the item pool required to unlock the winning song.

options.name: explicit_lyrics
options.description:
Allows Songs with 18+ Lyrics to generate.
While this can be played on the main Archipelago Server, Streaming them there is not reccomended.

options.name: enable_loved
options.description: Allows Loved Beatmaps to Appear when Generating. Not Reccomended with 'Disable Difficulty Reduction' Enabled.

options.name: shuffle_included_songs
options.description:
Shuffles the songs in "Include Songs" to be randomly placed anywhere in the Rando.
IF Enabled, included songs can appear as starting or goal songs.
If Disabled, included songs will be added in ascending order by ID after the starting songs.
IE: If you have 5 starting songs, the first ID will be song 6, the next will be song 6, etc.

options.name: include_songs
options.description: List of Beatmapset IDs to include, each replacing a Rando song.

options.name: exclude_songs
options.description: List of Beatmapset IDs to exclude. Listed Beatmapset IDs cannot appear in the Rando.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
